data.name: Hentai Clicker: Stella is streaming
data.detailed_description:
🎮 Welcome to Hentai Clicker: Stella is streaming

Step under the spotlight with Stella, the radiant idol whose every move drives her fans wild.
She’s beautiful, confident, and loves to perform—but when the lights dim, she’s ready to show her true self.
Every click brings you closer to her heart (and her secrets), turning applause into desire. 💋🎤

🎵 About the Game

Hentai Clicker: Stella is streaming mixes addictive clicker gameplay with the glamour and temptation of the idol world.
Each tap turns up the heat on stage—collect hearts from her fans, unlock dazzling outfits, and experience her most intimate performances.
From innocent charm to sensual confidence, Stella’s journey will captivate you one beat at a time. 💫

🔞 NSFW Content

Dive into the forbidden backstage of fame.
Watch Stella’s transformation from elegant star to teasing diva in uncensored, animated erotic scenes, featuring seductive poses, moans, and provocative energy that only a true idol could deliver.

🎉 Features

🎤 Idol Fantasy – A gorgeous singer adored by millions, yet yours to command.
🎨 Stunning Anime Art – High-quality visuals that make every performance shine.
🖱️ Addictive Clicker Gameplay – Simple, satisfying, and endlessly rewarding.
💗 Unlockable Outfits – From concert dresses to revealing stagewear.
🔊 Lewd Voice Acting – Gasps, giggles, and sultry lyrics that respond to your clicks.
🚀 Progression System – Collect hearts, level up, and unlock Stella’s secret encores.

💖 Why You’ll Love It

If you’ve ever dreamed of being backstage with a pop idol who sings just for you,
Stella is the fantasy you’ve been waiting for.
Sweet, talented, and irresistibly naughty—she’ll make you her number-one fan forever. 😈

🎮 How to Play

🖱️ Click to Collect Hearts – Every tap earns applause and affection.
🔓 Unlock Scenes – Spend hearts to reveal new outfits and intimate interactions.
💥 Upgrade Skills – Boost your performance and raise the temperature on stage.

🎉 The Show Begins!

She’s live, she’s singing, and all eyes are on her.
Join Hentai Clicker: Stella is streaming and discover what happens when the spotlight turns just for you. 💋🎤

data.short_description: 🎤 Step into the spotlight with Hentai Clicker: Stella is streaming! 💫 Click to collect ❤️, unlock dazzling idol outfits, and enjoy stunning anime visuals, explicit scenes, and sultry voice acting from your favorite superstar! 💋🔥
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 韓文, 日文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 ou équivalent
  • 記憶體: 2 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Carte intégrée (Intel HD Graphics 3000)
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 ou équivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 560
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon and Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics 4000
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.11
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon and Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: AMD Radeon R9 M370X
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Carte intégrée (Intel HD Graphics 3000)
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 560
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
